title: Quickjoin
description: Quickly join any game on Hypixel!
body: # Quickjoin ![Powered by OneConfig](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Polyfrost/Nexus/main/apps/website/public/media/branding/badges/badge_1.png) Icon by Freepik Quickly join any game on hypixel! ## Installing - Get the most recent [RELEASE](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickjoin/versions) - Launch forge 1.8.9 with the mod ## How to use /quickjoin while on Hypixel ## Features - Constant updates - Every game on hypixel included - Saves your time clicking NPCs with a colorful button GUI ## Screenshots For all images, have a look in [images](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickjoin/gallery) ![QuickJoinGui](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/Quickjoin/blob/main/images/QuickJoinGui.png?raw=true) ![Config](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/Quickjoin/blob/main/images/Config.png?raw=true) ![BedWarsGui](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/Quickjoin/blob/main/images/BedWarsGui.png?raw=true) ![ClassicGui](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/Quickjoin/blob/main/images/ClassicGui.png?raw=true)
